title: Pickaxe+
description: Pickaxe+ adds three unique pickaxes: Melon Pickaxe (coming soon), TNT Pickaxe (spawns TNT instead of mining blocks), and Dirt Pickaxe (basic tool made from dirt). Fun chaos included!
body:
Pickaxe+ Mod
Hey! So I made this mod that adds some weird pickaxes to the game. Here's what you get:

Melon Pickaxe - Every time you mine a block with this, you get a free melon! Pretty useful if you like melons or just want free food while mining.

TNT Pickaxe - This one's pretty funny. When you mine a block with it, it doesn't actually give you the block - it just spawns TNT there instead. So basically you're just blowing stuff up instead of mining. Great for trolling your friends or if you just want to cause chaos!

Dirt Pickaxe - It's literally a pickaxe made of dirt. Not very strong, but hey, it works!

Coal Pickaxe - A basic pickaxe made from coal. Nothing special, just mines blocks normally.

So why download this?
Honestly, it's just for fun. If you want some goofy tools to mess around with,
this mod's got you covered. The TNT pickaxe is hilarious, the melon one gives you free food, and the dirt/coal pickaxes are just silly alternatives.

Download it if you want to have some fun! Just don't use the TNT pickaxe if you actually want to collect blocks lmao
